title: EP - Invalid password for valid email should not authenticate
precondition: User with email 'valid@example.com' is registered with password 'correctPassword123'
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter valid email 'valid@example.com'
Enter invalid password 'wrongPassword'
Click login button
expected_result: Authentication fails; error message displayed; user remains on login page

title: DT - Invalid password triggers rejection
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter valid email 'valid@example.com'
Enter an invalid password (not matching stored)
Submit login form
expected_result: Authentication rejected; user not logged in; error message displayed
